scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); ['package-lock.json','yarn.lock'].forEach((file)=>{ try { fs.rmSync(file,{force:true}); } catch {} }); const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; if(!ua.startsWith('pnpm/')) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --workspace-concurrency=1 --filter "@toppers/*" --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:packages && pnpm -r --workspace-concurrency=1 --filter "@toppers/*" --if-present run typecheck
